frontMatter.title: Comet KVM (GL‑RM1) Review: The Best Affordable KVM Over IP for Remote Access

frontMatter.summary: The Comet KVM (GL-RM1) provides reliable, BIOS-level remote access over IP with HDMI and USB-C support—perfect for IT pros, home labs, and server maintenance, all without subscription fees.
